variants: Rahela Sehic is a notable inventor and author who created the Verdant Array Module. Born in Dewpoint Glen, she has since made her home in Harborbell Ridge. In her spare time, Rahela enjoys being a part of the Malachite Glassblowers Circle, connecting with fellow enthusiasts and enhancing her glassblowing skills. She continues to inspire others with her creativity and passion.

Currently residing in Harborbell Ridge, Rahela Sehic hails from the charming town of Dewpoint Glen. A member of the Malachite Glassblowers Circle, she not only works on her inventions but also actively participates in collaborative glassblowing projects. Rahela's diverse interests and achievements highlight her multifaceted talents.
